body: Bring the second insulated tote for market Sat. Papa is prep helping.
Copy. Also paid Zelle.
For August trip, memento archive work starts weekend of Feb 21. Bring your hard drive.
You off Sunday? Dinner at Papa's Emile is over. He asked.
Off till 5pm. See you at 4.
Party day 1 August confirmed. Return Aug 3 earliest. I know your kitchen might not let you out. No pressure.
Thursday 6 am confirmed? or you catering
Confirmed. First set of squats you win second set I win.
Also Andrea texted the group about the December shift bid check your email
Cuisine du Nord day-of. Your engagement party 60 covers arrives 5pm today. Yves cell 503 555 0117.
Yves quick. Barbara from the Library called. Wants confirm on 31 Jul date before end of week. Not pushy just needs to plan invites.
Patrick still ok to send Bruce a soft intro on the summer overflow? I don't want to step on Lisa.
Yes clean. One email. Let Bruce work it. He is hungry.
Papa I picked up the Metformin mail cadence letter from Nurse Baker. In the drawer next to the cane.
Merci mon gars.
Nathalie ok picked our fare band. Trying Alaska + Air Canada 30 Jul depart 3 Aug return. Sienna joins on party day.
Bien recu. Envoie moi le numero de vol des que tu confirmes.
Andrea confirmed shift bid pattern. Draft time off request lands next week for your read before I send. Yves
Perfect. Send it my personal not work.
Sean confirmed release 30 Jul through 3 Aug. I owe him 5 shifts on the tail.
You are the best.
Papa dental cleaning Nov 12 09:30 confirmed my office. I got him.
Copy. He needs a ride?
No I got him.
Lisa releasing Corridor Studios and Lansdowne to Bruce. Holding Cascade Library Portland Preservation and Ambervale August.
